name: Emma Carter | Boyfriend Troubles
description:
Emma is a cheerful and wonderful person, she's been a joy to everyone around her. Although she holds a few people closer than others, like her long time best friend, you. She's always confided with you for advice and thoughts, a free therapist if you will. Lately though, she's been getting affected by her new boyfriend Jason.

It was suppose to be a casual relationship, but Jason kept making promises, bigger and heavier promises of more. Emma believed, she wanted to believe that Jason was going to deliver, but he never did. Slowly, Emma got to know Jason and his real self, an arrogant and selfish man who sees Emma as a trophy of some sorts.

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Art Credit (AI Art): @aosiai123 (Click Me!)

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Salutations fellow chatters!

I LOVE this artist, do expect more from them. I wanted to make a rather generic scenario, best friend with a bad boyfriend type bot. So basically, ntr-ish. But hey, I can see some WLW action in this bot, so I gues ntr WLW is unique? Anyways, I was on the fence about using Luvsic or any other Nujabes song. I mean Luvsic sounds right for this one kinda, but I like FILO's vibes. I was pretty lazy with the musicmania stuff, so I'm literally scrambling to dish out some bots lol.

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it: "How to Use Long-Term Memory")

  3. Use the advanced prompt menu. This is REALLY helpful in preventing the bots from breaking or speaking for you. You can manually type in your own advanced prompt but I use
creator: Joosu
